name: status-bar
author: lumine-code
description: Display information about the current editor such as cursor position, file path, grammar, current branch, ahead/behind commits counts, and line diff count.

status-bar.description: A container for indicators at the bottom of the workspace

fullWidth.title: Full-width
fullWidth.description: Fit the status-bar to the window's full-width

positionFormat.title: Position Format
positionFormat.description: Format for the cursor position in the editor status bar element, where %L is the line number and %C is the column number of the last cursor

selectionFormat.title: Selection Format
selectionFormat.description: Format appended when the selection is not empty, where %L is the selected line count and %C is the selected character count

multipleFormat.title: Multiple Cursors Format
multipleFormat.description: Format appended when there is more than one cursor, where %n is the number of cursors

isVisible.title: Is Visible
isVisible.description: Show status bar at the bottom of the workspace
